seconds.vision_desc: looking down a deep pale wax shaft inside a jar candle
blackened wick stub sitting in a small pool of liquid wax at the bottom
slow dolly closer down the tunnel
faint light catching the smooth tunnel walls
the drowned wick tilts in its little pool
wet wax glistening around the dead wick
shadows shifting in the deep shaft
final close framing of the drowned wick

windows.embed_text: extreme close-up down a deep wax shaft inside a glass jar candle, a blackened drowned wick stub in a small pool of liquid wax at the bottom, warm light on the pale tunnel walls | the drowned wick at the bottom of a tunneled candle
